name: needy little fox — hoshimi miyabi .
description:
and so i make my return once more .

very rarely do i find myself on this site anymore tbh, but the people are starving — so i must deliver . may you enjoy this miyabi bot .

classical heat scenario; mid january is when fox mating season starts, after all. warning for the following content: possessiveness, breeding, blood play, romantic cannibalism, extreme marking, possible branding, overstimulation, etc.

song listened to while making this;

appetite by STIM.
creator: abyssaldecimation
